title: cladium iridifolium
intro: Cladium iridifolium, also known as yellow-eyed grass or lake marguerite, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cladium iridifolium include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
